name: FlutterHelm Harness
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"; command -v mise >/dev/null 2>&1 || curl https://mise.run | sh; export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"; mise trust "$PWD/mise.toml"; mise install; mise exec -- pnpm -C harness install; mise exec -- pnpm -C harness bootstrap'
